description: Displayed to the TPO in UiPath Action Center. Shows AI-ranked candidates for review and shortlist approval.

fields.name: drive_id
fields.label: Drive ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this placement drive instance

fields.name: candidates_table
fields.label: AI-Ranked Candidates
fields.description: Candidates ranked by AI score. Review scores and reasoning before making your decision.

options.label: Approve All (shortlist everyone the AI recommended)
Approve Selected (I'll pick from the list below)
Reject All (cancel drive — no suitable candidates)

fields.name: selected_student_ids
fields.label: Select Candidates to Shortlist
fields.description: Check the candidates you want to shortlist for interview. Only enabled when 'Approve Selected' is chosen.

fields.name: tpo_notes
fields.label: Notes for Company HR (optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g. Please be flexible with timing for candidates 3 and 5 — they have exams that week.

outputVariables.selected_student_ids: maps to process variable: shortlisted_ids (JSON array of student_id strings)
